description_long: This is a modern apartment building with a rectangular footprint, featuring two stories and a flat roof. The exterior is primarily clad in dark gray brick, with large, vertically aligned windows providing ample natural light to the interior. The front facade includes a prominent balcony on the upper floor, supported by metal railings, and a main entrance below with a set of double windows above it. The rear and side facades are more austere, with evenly spaced windows and minimal decorative elements. The building's design emphasizes clean lines, symmetry, and functional outdoor space. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, suitable for an urban residential neighborhood.
description: A two-story modern apartment building with dark brick walls, large windows, and a prominent balcony on the upper floor. The design is sleek, symmetrical, and contemporary.
description_view_0: This view shows the front and left side, highlighting the main entrance, double windows above, and the upper-floor balcony with metal railings.
description_view_1: The rear view displays a plain brick wall with four symmetrically arranged windows and no balcony or entrance.
description_view_2: This view shows the front and right side, mirroring the left but with the same prominent balcony and window arrangement.
description_view_3: The direct front view emphasizes the full width of the balcony, the main entrance below, and the symmetrical window layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical pairs on each floor, with consistent spacing and alignment across all facades.
